experimental_design: Overexpression of eGFP-TauP301L causes basal hyperexcitability.
factor_value: overexpression of eGFP-TauP301L relative to eGFP or eGFP-TauWT.
number_of_fractions: The text does not specify fractions, but it implies at least one fractionation step.
number_of_biological_replicates: The text does not specify the number of embryos used, but it implies at least one.
